content.full_text:
February 18, 1992

Scott Hallabrin, General Counsel
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

The purpose of this letter is to seek advice from the Commission in answer to the following questions:

1. After the conclusion of a special election to fill a vacancy in the Legislature, may a candidate transfer remaining funds raised for that election to another committee controlled by that same candidate?

2. May such funds remaining after a special election be utilized by the candidate for transfer to committees controlled by other candidates?

Thank you for your time and attention to this matter. I look forward to your reply.

Sincerely,

David Roberti

DAVID ROBERTI
President pro Tempore
California State Senate
